events.detail: Project prompt confirmed by user
project_brief.json written to docs/project_brief.json
Fanned out to Architect, Infra, CI/CD Builder, Sprint Planner in parallel
All 4 planning agents completed successfully
Branch plan/proj_vps_devops_platform ready for review by Helmwill
events.gate: PLANNING_PR_APPROVAL — all items must be approved before execution unlocks

events.detail: Planning PR reviewed and approved by Helmwill; execution unlocked
Human issued execute command; beginning Sprint 1 story execution
Story 1.1 complete — Docker network scaffold and README merged to dev
Story 1.2 complete — Traefik v2 reverse proxy with ACME/TLS, HTTP→HTTPS redirect, and dashboard basic-auth committed to dev

Story 1.3 complete — GitHub Actions workflow files (pr-gate, deploy-dev, deploy-qa, deploy-prod) committed to .github/workflows/; old .gitea/workflows/ removed; human gate AWAITING_HUMAN_SECRET acknowledged — user to create GitHub Environments (dev, qa, production) and add 8 secrets before pipelines run live
Story 1.4 complete — dev/, qa/, prod/ compose files with Traefik subdomain routing merged
Story 2.1 complete — Node.js/TypeScript backend scaffold with Express, dockerode client, GET /health, Jest 100% coverage
Story 3.1 complete — Vite + React + TypeScript frontend scaffold with Nginx, Vitest, non-root Dockerfile
Story 2.2 complete — GET /api/containers endpoint with running/stopped/errored status mapping, 503 on daemon unavailability
Story 4.2 complete — Docker socket hardening: read_only, tmpfs /tmp, no-new-privileges, non-root user, ADR-006
GitHub Environments (dev, qa, production) created and all 8 secrets configured

Story 3.4 complete — dev/qa/prod compose files updated to two-service split (dashboard-backend + dashboard-frontend); Traefik path routing: /api/* and /health → backend (port 3000, priority 10), / → frontend nginx (port 8080, priority 1); deploy-qa and deploy-prod workflows updated to pull both images; prod smoke test URL corrected to dashboard.${DOMAIN}

Story 4.1 complete — basicauth middleware already wired in Story 3.4 compose files via DASHBOARD_AUTH env var (htpasswd string); all three environments (dev/qa/prod) protected; Traefik returns 401 + WWW-Authenticate for unauthenticated requests

Story 6.1 complete — HEALTHCHECK added to backend Dockerfile (wget /health, 30s/5s/10s/3) and frontend Dockerfile (wget /, same params); Compose healthcheck blocks added to all six services across dev/qa/prod; Traefik healthcheck added to infra compose; containerService.resolveStatus updated to return errored for running containers with (unhealthy) in Status string; test added for unhealthy container scenario
Story 5.2 complete — Semgrep T2 SAST job already present in pr-gate.yml from Story 5.1; scans with --config=auto --error; CRITICAL/HIGH findings hard block; SARIF artifact uploaded
Story 5.3 complete — Trivy T3 IaC scan job already present in pr-gate.yml from Story 5.1; trivy config . on all Compose files and Dockerfiles; HIGH/CRITICAL exit-code 1 hard block; artifact uploaded

Story 5.4 complete — tests/performance/load-test.js created (20 VUs, 30s, p99<500ms threshold); deploy-qa.yml performance-test job references it via K6_TARGET_URL; integration-test job fixed to use dashboard/backend working-directory with DASHBOARD_CREDENTIALS env var; live-api.test.ts integration test created (skipped locally, runs against QA URL)

Story 5.5 complete — Gitleaks + Trivy CVE scan already in deploy-qa.yml security-gate job; image tagged with commit SHA in deploy-dev.yml build job; prod_deployment_approval gate present as approval-gate job targeting production environment; workflow status badges added to README

Story 6.2 complete — scripts/smoke.sh created (tests /health, /api/containers, /api/stats, /); smoke-test-prod in deploy-prod.yml now uses smoke.sh with DASHBOARD_CREDENTIALS; rollback-prod job added (runs on smoke failure, restores prev_image_tag captured before deploy); teardown-qa writes rich deployment summary to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY; README badges added for PR Gate, Deploy Dev, Deploy Prod workflows

next_gate_action: Review and merge open PRs: #13 (Story 3.4), #14 (Story 6.1), and new PR for Stories 5.4/5.5/6.2 pipeline final

amendments.detail: SCM/CI platform switched from Gitea (self-hosted) to GitHub + GitHub Actions. Rationale: project runs in GitHub Codespace; self-hosting a second SCM is redundant. See ADR-005.
changes: Created .github/workflows/ with migrated workflow files (gitea.* context → github.*)
